'''sakava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zajal|zajal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zajal|zajal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sakava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækævæth|sækævæth]] || [[word:sækævæj|sækævæj]] || [[word:sækævæsh|sækævæsh]] || [[word:sækævæ|sækævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakakavath|sakakavath]] || [[word:sakakavaj|sakakavaj]] || [[word:sakakavash|sakakavash]] || [[word:sakakava|sakakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakavath|sakavath]] || [[word:sakavaj|sakavaj]] || [[word:sakavash|sakavash]] || [[word:sakava|sakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakafvath|sakafvath]] || [[word:sakafvaj|sakafvaj]] || [[word:sakafvash|sakafvash]] || [[word:sakafvaf|sakafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakavatha|sakavatha]] || [[word:sakavaja|sakavaja]] || [[word:sakavasha|sakavasha]] || [[word:sakavaka|sakavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakavath|sakavath]] || [[word:sakavaj|sakavaj]] || [[word:sakavash|sakavash]] || [[word:sakava|sakava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakavathal|sakavathal]] || [[word:sakavajal|sakavajal]] || [[word:sakavashal|sakavashal]] || [[word:sakavakal|sakavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakavathatha|sakavathatha]] || [[word:sakavajaja|sakavajaja]] || [[word:sakavashasha|sakavashasha]] || [[word:sakavaka|sakavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakavathan|sakavathan]] || [[word:sakavajan|sakavajan]] || [[word:sakavashan|sakavashan]] || [[word:sakavakan|sakavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakavathaoro|sakavathaoro]] || [[word:sakavajaoro|sakavajaoro]] || [[word:sakavashaoro|sakavashaoro]] || [[word:sakavakaoro|sakavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
